name: css-modules
author: MadAppGang
description:
CSS Modules with Lightning CSS and PostCSS for component-scoped styling.
Covers *.module.css patterns, TypeScript integration, Vite configuration, and composition.
Use when building complex animations, styling third-party components, or migrating legacy CSS.
description_zh: 该技能详细介绍了在Vite项目中使用Lightning CSS和PostCSS实现CSS Modules的方法。涵盖文件命名规范、组合模式、TypeScript集成以及与Tailwind的混合使用方案。提供动画、第三方组件样式和性能优化的实际示例。
_original_description: This skill provides detailed guidance on implementing CSS Modules with Lightning CSS and PostCSS in Vite projects. It covers file naming conventions, composition patterns, TypeScript integration, and hybrid approaches with Tailwind. Includes practical examples for animations, third-party component styling, and performance optimization.

name: data-extraction-patterns
author: MadAppGang
description: Common patterns for extracting analytics data from GA4 and GSC with API handling
description_zh: 提供从GA4和Google Search Console API提取数据的实用模式，包括并行执行、缓存、速率限制和错误处理。专注于具体实现细节而非抽象概念。
_original_description: Provides concrete patterns for extracting data from GA4 and Google Search Console APIs, including parallel execution, caching, rate limiting, and error handling. Focuses on practical implementation details rather than abstract concepts.

name: database-patterns
author: MadAppGang
description: Use when designing database schemas, implementing repository patterns, writing optimized queries, managing migrations, or working with indexes and transactions for SQL/NoSQL databases.
description_zh: 提供数据库设计的实际代码示例，涵盖规范化、索引策略、查询优化、仓储模式和事务处理。包含SQL和TypeScript实现，同时涉及关系型数据库和NoSQL模式。
_original_description: Provides concrete SQL and TypeScript examples for common database patterns including normalization, indexing strategies, query optimization, repository pattern implementation, and transaction handling. Covers both relational and NoSQL approaches with practical code snippets.

name: debugger-detective
author: MadAppGang
description: ⚡ Debugging skill. Best for: 'why is X broken', 'find bug source', 'root cause analysis', 'trace error', 'debug issue'. Uses claudemem AST with context command for efficient call chain analysis.
description_zh: 使用AST调用链分析来追踪错误源头和查找根本原因的调试技能。提供结构化的bug调查工作流程，包含清晰的调用者与被调用者追踪命令。专注于理解代码执行流程而非文本搜索。
_original_description: A debugging skill that uses AST call chain analysis to trace error origins and find root causes. It provides structured workflows for bug investigation with clear commands for tracing callers and callees. Focuses on understanding code execution flow rather than text searching.

name: debugging-strategies
author: MadAppGang
description: Use when troubleshooting bugs, analyzing stack traces, using debugging tools (breakpoints, loggers), or applying systematic debugging methodology across any technology stack.
description_zh: 一份全面、语言无关的调试指南，涵盖系统方法论、实用技巧和常见模式，配有清晰示例和结构化方法。
_original_description: A comprehensive, language-agnostic debugging guide covering systematic methodologies, practical techniques, and common patterns with clear examples and structured approaches.

name: deep-analysis
author: MadAppGang
description: ⚡ PRIMARY SKILL for: 'how does X work', 'investigate', 'analyze architecture', 'trace flow', 'find implementations'. PREREQUISITE: code-search-selector must validate tool choice. Launches codebase-detective with claudemem INDEXED MEMORY.
description_zh: 一个全面的代码调查技能，提供结构化工作流程，利用语义搜索和侦探代理进行深度代码库分析，具有清晰的先决条件和分阶段执行。
_original_description: A comprehensive code investigation skill that provides structured workflows for deep codebase analysis using semantic search and detective agents, with clear prerequisites and phased execution.

name: dependency-check
author: MadAppGang
description: Check for required dependencies (Chrome DevTools MCP, OpenRouter API) before running commands that need them. Use at the start of /implement, /review, /validate-ui commands to provide helpful setup guidance.
description_zh: 在运行前端命令前检查Chrome DevTools MCP和OpenRouter API依赖。提供清晰的安装指导，当依赖缺失时能优雅降级继续工作。通过提前验证前置条件避免运行时错误。
_original_description: Checks for Chrome DevTools MCP and OpenRouter API dependencies before running frontend commands. Provides clear setup guidance and graceful degradation when dependencies are missing. Helps avoid runtime errors by verifying prerequisites early in workflows.

name: design-references
author: MadAppGang
description:
Predefined design system references for UI reviews. Includes Material Design 3,
Apple Human Interface Guidelines, Tailwind UI, Ant Design, and Shadcn/ui.
Use when conducting design reviews against established design systems.
description_zh: 提供Material Design 3、Apple HIG、Tailwind UI和Ant Design的设计系统结构化参考数据。包含色彩体系、字体排版、间距规范和组件模式。为UI代理提供具体检查清单，用于对照标准评估设计。
_original_description: Provides structured reference data for Material Design 3, Apple HIG, Tailwind UI, and Ant Design. Includes color systems, typography scales, spacing rules, and component patterns. Helps UI agents evaluate designs against established standards with specific checklists for each system.

name: developer-detective
author: MadAppGang
description: ⚡ Implementation analysis skill. Best for: 'how does X work', 'find implementation of', 'trace data flow', 'where is X defined', 'find all usages'. Uses claudemem AST with callers/callees for efficient code tracing.
description_zh: 使用AST调用图分析而非文本搜索的代码库分析工具。帮助开发者理解实现细节，通过callees追踪数据流，通过callers识别使用模式，并在修改前评估影响。专注于精确的文件:行引用和结构关系。
_original_description: A specialized tool for analyzing codebases using AST call graph analysis instead of text search. It helps developers understand implementation details, trace data flow via callees, identify usage patterns via callers, and assess impact before making changes. Focuses on precise file:line references and structural relationships.

name: error-handling
author: MadAppGang
description: Use when implementing custom error classes, error middleware, structured logging, retry logic, or graceful shutdown patterns in backend applications.
description_zh: 一个全面的Node.js/TypeScript后端错误处理框架，包含自定义错误类、中间件、验证和外部服务错误管理。
_original_description: A comprehensive error handling framework for Node.js/TypeScript backends with custom error classes, middleware, validation, and external service error management.

name: error-recovery
author: MadAppGang
description: Handle errors, timeouts, and failures in multi-agent workflows. Use when dealing with external model timeouts, API failures, partial success, user cancellation, or graceful degradation. Trigger keywords - "error", "failure", "timeout", "retry", "fallback", "cancelled", "graceful degradation", "recovery", "partial success".
description_zh: 为多智能体工作流提供具体的故障处理模式，包括超时管理、API错误恢复和优雅降级策略。包含重试逻辑、用户通知和回退机制的具体代码示例。
_original_description: Provides concrete patterns for handling failures in multi-agent workflows, including timeout management, API error recovery, and graceful degradation strategies. Offers specific code examples for retry logic, user notification, and fallback mechanisms.

name: ffmpeg-core
author: MadAppGang
description: FFmpeg fundamentals for video/audio manipulation. Covers common operations (trim, concat, convert, extract), codec selection, filter chains, and performance optimization. Use when planning or executing video processing tasks.
description_zh: 一份全面且结构清晰的FFmpeg参考指南，涵盖核心音视频操作，提供实用示例、编码器推荐和性能优化建议。
_original_description: A comprehensive and well-structured FFmpeg reference guide covering essential video/audio operations with practical examples, codec recommendations, and performance optimization tips.

name: final-cut-pro
author: MadAppGang
description: Apple Final Cut Pro FCPXML format reference. Covers project structure, timeline creation, clip references, effects, and transitions. Use when generating FCP projects or understanding FCPXML structure.
description_zh: 一个全面的FCPXML参考技能，提供生产就绪的Final Cut Pro项目生成模式，文档优秀且示例实用。
_original_description: A comprehensive FCPXML reference skill that provides production-ready patterns for generating Final Cut Pro projects, with excellent documentation and practical examples.

name: gemini-api
author: MadAppGang
description: Google Gemini 3 Pro Image API reference. Covers text-to-image, editing, reference images, aspect ratios, and error handling.
description_zh: 一个使用Google Gemini 3 Pro API生成图像的CLI工具。提供文本到图像生成、图像编辑和通过Markdown模板应用样式的功能。支持多种宽高比，包含错误重试机制和清晰的错误代码。
_original_description: A CLI tool for generating images using Google's Gemini 3 Pro API. It provides a straightforward interface for text-to-image creation, image editing, and applying styles via markdown templates. Handles aspect ratios, retries on errors, and includes clear error codes.

name: golang
author: MadAppGang
description: Use when building Go backend services, implementing goroutines/channels, handling errors idiomatically, writing tests with testify, or following Go best practices for APIs/CLI tools.
description_zh: 提供构建Go后端服务的具体模式，包括项目结构、错误处理、HTTP处理器、仓储层、上下文使用、中间件、配置和测试。展示了优雅关闭、工作池等常见任务的实际代码示例。
_original_description: Provides concrete Go patterns for building backend services, including project structure, error handling, HTTP handlers, repositories, context usage, middleware, configuration, and testing. Shows actual code examples for common tasks like graceful shutdown and worker pools.

name: help
author: MadAppGang
description: Get help with Conductor - commands, usage examples, and best practices
description_zh: 为Conductor的上下文驱动开发系统提供内置帮助文档。详细说明所有命令（初始化、创建任务、执行、状态查看、回滚）的使用方法、目录结构和常见问题解决方案。是使用Conductor工作流的快速参考指南。
_original_description: Provides in-context help for Conductor's Context-Driven Development system. Documents all commands (setup, new-track, implement, status, revert) with clear examples, directory structure, and troubleshooting steps. Serves as a quick reference for developers using the Conductor workflow.

name: implement
author: MadAppGang
description: Execute tasks from track plan with TDD workflow and git commit integration
description_zh: 一个结构化实现助手，强制采用TDD方法并与Git提交集成。指导开发者完成红/绿/重构循环，在plan.md中维护任务状态，创建带Git注释的可追溯提交，并执行阶段完成协议。确保系统化的进度跟踪和质量关卡。
_original_description: A structured implementation assistant that enforces TDD methodology with git commit integration. It guides developers through Red/Green/Refactor cycles, maintains task status in plan.md, creates traceable commits with git notes, and executes phase completion protocols. The skill ensures systematic progress tracking and quality gates.

name: keyword-cluster-builder
author: MadAppGang
description: Techniques for expanding seed keywords and clustering by topic and intent. Use when building keyword lists, planning content calendars, or identifying topic clusters for pillar content strategy.
description_zh: 该技能通过问题、对比、意图和受众等修饰符模式，将种子关键词扩展为主题集群。提供清晰的分组算法和意图分类规则，输出采用标准化的Markdown格式，包含集群名称、意图和预估搜索量。
_original_description: This skill provides a structured method for expanding seed keywords into topic clusters using modifier patterns. It offers clear templates for question, comparative, intent, and audience modifiers, then groups results by semantic similarity and intent. The output follows a consistent markdown format with cluster names, intent classification, and estimated volumes.

name: link-strategy
author: MadAppGang
description: Internal linking strategy and anchor text optimization patterns. Use when planning internal links or optimizing site structure.
description_zh: 结构清晰的SEO工具，提供实用的内部链接策略框架，但仅限于概念指导，缺乏自动化实施功能。
_original_description: A well-structured SEO tool providing clear internal linking strategies with practical frameworks, though limited to conceptual guidance without automated implementation.

name: model-tracking-protocol
author: MadAppGang
description: MANDATORY tracking protocol for multi-model validation. Creates structured tracking tables BEFORE launching models, tracks progress during execution, and ensures complete results presentation. Use when running 2+ external AI models in parallel. Trigger keywords - "multi-model", "parallel review", "external models", "consensus", "model tracking".
description_zh: 为多模型AI验证工作流提供强制跟踪协议。强制执行启动前检查清单，创建结构化跟踪表，记录失败案例并进行共识分析。使用基于文件的标记而非环境变量，提高检测可靠性。
_original_description: Provides mandatory tracking protocols for multi-model AI validation workflows. Enforces pre-launch checklists, creates structured tracking tables, documents failures, and performs consensus analysis. Uses file-based markers instead of environment variables for better detection.

name: multi-agent-coordination
author: MadAppGang
description: Coordinate multiple agents in parallel or sequential workflows. Use when running agents simultaneously, delegating to sub-agents, switching between specialized agents, or managing agent selection. Trigger keywords - "parallel agents", "sequential workflow", "delegate", "multi-agent", "sub-agent", "agent switching", "task decomposition".
description_zh: 提供协调多个Claude智能体工作流的具体模式，重点区分并行与串行执行。解释实现真正并行的4消息模式，使用基于文件的委托避免上下文污染。包含智能体选择逻辑和反模式警告。
_original_description: Provides concrete patterns for coordinating multiple Claude agents in workflows, focusing on parallel vs sequential execution. Explains the 4-message pattern for true parallelism and file-based delegation to avoid context pollution. Includes agent selection logic and anti-pattern warnings.

name: multi-model-validation
author: MadAppGang
description: Run multiple AI models in parallel for 3-5x speedup with ENFORCED performance statistics tracking. Use when validating with Grok, Gemini, GPT-5, DeepSeek, MiniMax, Kimi, GLM, or Claudish proxy for code review, consensus analysis, or multi-expert validation. NEW in v3.2.0 - Direct API prefixes (mmax/, kimi/, glm/) for cost savings. Includes dynamic model discovery via `claudish --top-models` and `claudish --free`, session-based workspaces, and Pattern 7-8 for tracking model performance. Trigger keywords - "grok", "gemini", "gpt-5", "deepseek", "minimax", "kimi", "glm", "claudish", "multiple models", "parallel review", "external AI", "consensus", "multi-model", "model performance", "statistics", "free models".
description_zh: 该技能用于并行运行多个AI模型（Grok、Gemini、GPT-5等）进行代码验证和审查。通过并发处理实现3-5倍加速，强制执行性能统计收集，并包含动态模型发现功能。3.1.0版本增加了强制检查清单和基于会话的工作空间。
_original_description: This skill orchestrates parallel execution of multiple AI models (Grok, Gemini, GPT-5, etc.) for code validation and review. It provides 3-5x speedup through concurrent processing, enforces performance statistics collection, and includes dynamic model discovery. Version 3.1.0 adds mandatory checklist enforcement and session-based workspaces.

name: new-track
author: MadAppGang
description: Create development track with spec and hierarchical plan through interactive Q&A
description_zh: 该技能通过交互式问答引导用户创建包含规格说明和分层计划的开发任务跟踪。它强制执行先写规格再定计划的流程，读取项目上下文文件，并与TodoWrite系统集成以跟踪进度。
_original_description: This skill guides users through creating structured development tracks with specifications and hierarchical plans. It enforces a spec-before-plan workflow, reads project context files, and integrates with a TodoWrite system for progress tracking. The interactive Q&A approach ensures requirements are captured before planning begins.

name: openrouter-trending-models
author: MadAppGang
description: Fetch trending programming models from OpenRouter rankings. Use when selecting models for multi-model review, updating model recommendations, or researching current AI coding trends. Provides model IDs, context windows, pricing, and usage statistics from the most recent week.
description_zh: 该技能从OpenRouter排行榜获取每周热门编程模型数据，提供模型ID、上下文长度、定价和使用统计。帮助开发者选择适合代码审查任务的AI模型并进行成本优化。脚本输出包含元数据和统计摘要的结构化JSON。
_original_description: This skill fetches weekly trending programming models from OpenRouter rankings, providing model IDs, context windows, pricing, and usage stats. It helps developers select appropriate AI models for code review tasks and cost optimization. The script outputs structured JSON with metadata and summary statistics.

name: patterns
author: MadAppGang
description: Common agent patterns and templates for Claude Code. Use when implementing agents to follow proven patterns for Tasks integration, quality checks, and external model invocation via claudish CLI.
description_zh: 提供Claude智能体开发的结构化模式，包括代理模式接入外部模型、TodoWrite进度追踪和代码质量检查。该技能定义了规划者、实施者、评审者和协调者四种智能体类型的标准化工作流程。
_original_description: Provides structured patterns for Claude agent development including proxy mode delegation to external models, TodoWrite progress tracking, and code quality validation. The skill defines standardized workflows for planner, implementer, reviewer, and orchestrator agent types.

name: performance-correlation
author: MadAppGang
description: Correlate content attributes with GA4 and GSC metrics to identify performance drivers
description_zh: 一款全面的SEO分析工具，能有效关联GA4和GSC指标与内容属性，识别性能驱动因素和优化机会。
_original_description: A comprehensive SEO analysis tool that effectively correlates GA4 and GSC metrics with content attributes to identify performance drivers and optimization opportunities.

name: performance-security
author: MadAppGang
description: Use when optimizing performance or reviewing security. Covers code-splitting, React Compiler patterns, asset optimization, a11y testing, and security hardening for React apps.
description_zh: 一份全面、生产就绪的指南，涵盖现代React应用必备的性能、可访问性和安全实践，并提供实用的代码示例。
_original_description: A comprehensive, production-ready guide covering essential performance, accessibility, and security practices for modern React applications with practical code examples.

name: proxy-mode-reference
author: MadAppGang
description: Reference guide for using external AI models via claudish CLI. Use when running multi-model reviews, understanding how /team invokes external models, or debugging external model integration issues. Includes routing prefixes for MiniMax, Kimi, GLM direct APIs.
description_zh: 一个全面的PROXY_MODE参考指南，用于在Claude代理系统中无缝集成外部AI模型，实现多模型工作流编排。
_original_description: A comprehensive reference guide for orchestrating multi-model AI workflows through PROXY_MODE directive, enabling seamless integration of external AI models within Claude's agent system.

name: python
author: MadAppGang
description: Use when building FastAPI applications, implementing async endpoints, setting up Pydantic schemas, working with SQLAlchemy, or writing pytest tests for Python backend services.
description_zh: 提供生产就绪的FastAPI后端架构模式，包含清晰的代码结构、异步数据库操作和仓储模式实现。
_original_description: A comprehensive Python backend skill providing production-ready FastAPI patterns with clean architecture, async database operations, and repository pattern implementation.

name: quality-gates
author: MadAppGang
description: Implement quality gates, user approval, iteration loops, and test-driven development. Use when validating with users, implementing feedback loops, classifying issue severity, running test-driven loops, or building multi-iteration workflows. Trigger keywords - "approval", "user validation", "iteration", "feedback loop", "severity", "test-driven", "TDD", "quality gate", "consensus".
description_zh: 一个用于在多智能体系统中实施质量门禁和审批流程的全面框架，提供经过实战检验的迭代优化和用户验证模式。
_original_description: A comprehensive framework for implementing quality gates and approval workflows in multi-agent systems, providing battle-tested patterns for iterative refinement and user validation.

name: react-patterns
author: MadAppGang
description: Use when implementing React 19 features, optimizing components, or choosing between Actions vs TanStack Query for mutations. Covers React Compiler optimization, Server Actions, Forms, and new hooks.
description_zh: 提供React 19特性的具体模式，包括React编译器优化、服务器操作和新钩子。明确指导何时使用Actions与TanStack Query进行数据变更，包含表单处理、乐观更新和组件组合的实际代码示例。
_original_description: Provides concrete patterns for React 19 features including React Compiler optimization, Server Actions, and new hooks. Offers clear guidance on when to use Actions vs TanStack Query mutations, with practical code examples for form handling, optimistic updates, and component composition.

name: react-typescript
author: MadAppGang
description: Modern React 19+ patterns with TypeScript including function components, hooks, state management, TanStack Query integration, form handling with Zod, error boundaries, and performance optimization. Use when building React applications, implementing components, or setting up state management.
description_zh: 提供React 19+与TypeScript的具体开发模式，包括函数组件、自定义Hook、Context/Zustand状态管理、TanStack Query集成、React Hook Form结合Zod的表单处理、错误边界和性能优化技术如记忆化。
_original_description: Provides concrete React 19+ TypeScript patterns for function components, hooks, state management with Context/Zustand, TanStack Query integration, form handling using React Hook Form with Zod, error boundaries, and performance optimization techniques like memoization.

name: release
author: MadAppGang
description: Plugin release process for MAG Claude Plugins marketplace. Covers version bumping, marketplace.json updates, git tagging, and common mistakes. Use when releasing new plugin versions or troubleshooting update issues.
description_zh: 为Claude Code插件发布提供详细检查清单，涵盖版本更新、marketplace.json同步和Git标签创建。重点解决常见错误，如忘记更新市场目录导致用户看不到新版本。
_original_description: Provides a step-by-step checklist for releasing Claude Code plugins, focusing on version bumping, marketplace.json updates, and git tagging. Includes troubleshooting for common mistakes like forgetting to update marketplace catalog.

name: revert
author: MadAppGang
description: Git-aware logical undo at track, phase, or task level with confirmation gates
description_zh: 提供任务、阶段或轨道级别的结构化git回滚操作，包含强制确认步骤。集成TodoWrite跟踪工作流，通过验证检查保持项目一致性。面向使用Conductor进行项目管理的开发团队。
_original_description: Provides structured git revert operations at task, phase, or track levels with mandatory confirmation steps. Integrates with TodoWrite for workflow tracking and maintains project consistency through validation checks. Targets development teams using Conductor for project management.

name: router-query-integration
author: MadAppGang
description: Use when setting up route loaders or optimizing navigation performance. Integrates TanStack Router with TanStack Query for optimal data fetching. Covers route loaders with query prefetching, ensuring instant navigation, and eliminating request waterfalls.
description_zh: 提供将TanStack Router与TanStack Query集成的具体模式，消除导航时的请求瀑布。展示如何在组件渲染前使用路由加载器预取数据，包含并行查询、依赖查询和错误处理的示例。
_original_description: Provides concrete patterns for integrating TanStack Router with TanStack Query to eliminate request waterfalls during navigation. Shows how to use route loaders to prefetch data before components render, with examples for parallel queries, dependent queries, and error handling.

name: rust
author: MadAppGang
description: Use when building Axum applications, implementing type-safe handlers, working with SQLx, setting up error handling with thiserror, or writing Rust backend services.
description_zh: 一个全面的Rust后端技能，提供基于Axum的生产就绪Web应用模式，包含清晰架构、错误处理和数据库集成。
_original_description: A comprehensive Rust backend skill providing production-ready patterns for Axum web applications with clean architecture, error handling, and database integration.

name: schema-markup
author: MadAppGang
description: Schema.org markup implementation patterns for rich results. Use when adding structured data to content for enhanced SERP appearances.
description_zh: 提供Article、FAQPage、HowTo等常见Schema.org类型的JSON-LD模板。包含实施清单和Google搜索结果验证步骤。帮助开发者无需记忆语法即可添加结构化数据。
_original_description: Provides ready-to-use JSON-LD templates for common Schema.org types like Article, FAQPage, and HowTo. Includes implementation checklists and validation steps for Google Search results. Helps developers add structured data without memorizing schema syntax.

name: schemas
author: MadAppGang
description: YAML frontmatter schemas for Claude Code agents and commands. Use when creating or validating agent/command files.
description_zh: 为Claude Code智能体和命令的前置元数据提供YAML模式模板和验证规则。包含字段参考、颜色指南、按智能体类型的工具模式以及验证清单。帮助开发者创建语法正确、结构一致的智能体定义。
_original_description: Provides YAML schema templates and validation rules for Claude Code agent and command frontmatter. Includes field references, color guidelines, tool patterns by agent type, and a validation checklist. Helps developers create consistent agent definitions with proper syntax and structure.

name: search-interceptor
author: MadAppGang
description: 💡 Bulk file read optimizer. Suggests semantic search alternatives when reading multiple files. Helps reduce token usage by using claudemem's ranked results instead of sequential file reads.
description_zh: 该技能在执行前拦截批量文件读取操作，建议使用Claude Memory语义搜索替代。它提供了明确的触发条件、决策矩阵和实用示例，以减少代码探索期间的令牌浪费。
_original_description: This skill intercepts bulk file read operations before execution and suggests using Claude Memory semantic search instead. It provides clear triggers for when to intervene, decision matrices, and practical examples to reduce token waste during code exploration.

name: serp-analysis
author: MadAppGang
description: SERP analysis techniques for intent classification, feature identification, and competitive intelligence. Use when analyzing search results for content strategy.
description_zh: 结构清晰的SERP分析框架，提供系统化的意图分类、功能识别和竞争分析方法，包含明确的输出模板。
_original_description: A well-structured SERP analysis framework providing systematic methodology for intent classification, feature identification, and competitive analysis with clear output templates.

name: session-isolation
author: MadAppGang
description: Use when orchestrating workflows that generate multiple files (designs, reviews, reports) to prevent file collisions across concurrent or sequential sessions with unique session directories.
description_zh: 一个结构良好的会话隔离模式，通过基于会话的目录隔离工作流产物，有效防止多智能体Claude工作流中的文件冲突，并具备清晰的向后兼容性。
_original_description: A well-structured pattern for isolating workflow artifacts using session-based directories, preventing file collisions in multi-agent Claude workflows with clear backward compatibility.

name: setup
author: MadAppGang
description: Initialize Conductor with product.md, tech-stack.md, and workflow.md
description_zh: 该技能通过交互式问答引导用户初始化Conductor项目，创建必要的文档文件。它能区分新项目和现有项目，保存进度状态以便恢复，最终生成product.md、tech-stack.md和workflow.md等核心文档。
_original_description: This skill guides users through initializing a Conductor project by creating essential documentation files. It uses interactive Q&A to gather project context, distinguishes between greenfield and brownfield projects, and saves progress state for resumable setup. The process generates product.md, tech-stack.md, and workflow.md files.

name: shadcn-ui
author: MadAppGang
description: Use when implementing UI components with shadcn/ui. Covers component installation, configuration with Vite/TanStack Router, CLI commands, and integration with Tailwind CSS.
description_zh: shadcn/ui组件库的全面文档技能，提供优秀的CLI指导、框架特定设置和实践实现示例。
_original_description: Comprehensive documentation skill for shadcn/ui component library with excellent CLI guidance, framework-specific setups, and practical implementation examples.

name: state-management
author: MadAppGang
description: Use when choosing state management solutions, implementing global stores (Zustand, Pinia), managing server state (TanStack Query), or handling URL state in frontend applications across React and Vue.
description_zh: 为前端应用状态管理提供清晰的决策树和具体代码示例，涵盖本地、全局、服务器和URL状态。包含React（Zustand/TanStack Query）和Vue（Pinia）的实践模式，指导何时使用何种方案。
_original_description: Provides clear decision trees and concrete code examples for choosing between local, global, server, and URL state in frontend applications. Covers React with Zustand/TanStack Query and Vue with Pinia, showing when to use each approach with practical patterns.

name: status
author: MadAppGang
description: Show active tracks, progress, current tasks, and blockers
description_zh: 设计精良的状态报告工具，提供全面的项目概览、清晰的可操作建议、优秀的错误处理和专业的输出格式。
_original_description: A well-designed status reporting skill that provides comprehensive project overview with clear actionable insights, excellent error handling, and professional output formatting.

name: style-format
author: MadAppGang
description: Style template format specification. Single markdown files that describe artistic direction.
description_zh: 一个结构良好的AI图像生成风格模板规范，为保持艺术方向一致性提供了清晰的指南、实用示例和安全考虑。
_original_description: A well-structured specification for AI image generation style templates that provides clear guidelines, practical examples, and security considerations for consistent artistic direction.

name: tailwindcss
author: MadAppGang
description:
TailwindCSS v4 patterns with CSS-first configuration using @theme, @source, and modern CSS features.
Covers design tokens, CSS variables, container queries, dark mode, and Vite integration.
Use when configuring Tailwind, defining design tokens, or leveraging modern CSS with Tailwind utilities.
description_zh: 提供TailwindCSS v4的CSS优先配置模式，使用@theme和@source指令。涵盖设计令牌、CSS变量、容器查询、深色模式和Vite集成。包含v3迁移指南和浏览器兼容性要求。
_original_description: Provides TailwindCSS v4 configuration patterns with CSS-first approach using @theme and @source directives. Covers design tokens, CSS variables, container queries, dark mode, and Vite integration. Includes migration guide from v3 and browser compatibility requirements.

name: tanstack-query
author: MadAppGang
description: Comprehensive TanStack Query v5 patterns for async state management. Covers breaking changes, query key factories, data transformation, mutations, optimistic updates, authentication, testing with MSW, and anti-patterns. Use for all server state management, data fetching, and cache invalidation tasks.
description_zh: 提供TanStack Query v5的详细实现模式，包括破坏性变更、带错误处理的客户端设置、Next.js的SSR配置以及React服务器组件集成。涵盖实际迁移指导和生产环境默认设置。
_original_description: Provides detailed implementation patterns for TanStack Query v5 including breaking changes, client setup with error handling, SSR configuration for Next.js, and integration with React Server Components. Covers practical migration guidance and production defaults.

name: tanstack-router
author: MadAppGang
description: TanStack Router patterns for type-safe, file-based routing. Covers installation, route configuration, typed params/search, layouts, and navigation. Use when setting up routes, implementing navigation, or configuring route loaders.
description_zh: 全面的TanStack Router技能，为现代React应用提供了类型安全、基于文件的路由的出色指导，涵盖安装、配置和高级模式。
_original_description: Comprehensive TanStack Router skill providing excellent guidance on type-safe, file-based routing with modern React applications, covering installation, configuration, and advanced patterns.

name: technical-audit
author: MadAppGang
description: Technical SEO audit methodology including crawlability, indexability, and Core Web Vitals analysis. Use when auditing pages or sites for technical SEO issues.
description_zh: 一个全面的技术SEO审计技能，涵盖可爬取性、可索引性、核心网页指标和结构化数据标记，具有清晰的结构化方法和输出格式。
_original_description: A comprehensive technical SEO audit skill with structured methodology covering crawlability, indexability, Core Web Vitals, and schema markup with clear output format.

name: tester-detective
author: MadAppGang
description: ⚡ Test analysis skill. Best for: 'what's tested', 'find test coverage', 'audit test quality', 'missing tests', 'edge cases'. Uses claudemem AST with callers analysis for efficient test discovery.
description_zh: 该技能通过claudemem的AST调用者分析来识别测试覆盖缺口，查找调用特定函数的测试，并检测未测试代码。它提供具体的测试发现命令，并将高PageRank的未测试函数优先标记为关键问题。
_original_description: This skill uses AST callers analysis via claudemem to identify test coverage gaps, find which tests call specific functions, and detect untested code. It provides concrete commands for test discovery and prioritizes high-PageRank untested functions as critical issues.

name: testing-frontend
author: MadAppGang
description: Use when writing component tests, testing user interactions, mocking APIs, or setting up Vitest/React Testing Library/Vue Test Utils for frontend applications.
description_zh: 为使用Vitest和Testing Library的React和Vue应用提供具体的测试模式。涵盖组件测试、异步操作、表单、钩子、模拟和集成测试，包含实用代码示例。提供测试组织、性能和可访问性测试的指导。
_original_description: Provides concrete testing patterns for React and Vue applications using Vitest and Testing Library. Covers component testing, async operations, forms, hooks, mocking, and integration tests with practical code examples. Includes guidance on test organization, performance, and accessibility testing.

name: testing-strategies
author: MadAppGang
description: Use when writing tests, setting up test frameworks, implementing mocking strategies, or establishing testing best practices (unit, integration, E2E) across any technology stack.
description_zh: 提供与语言无关的测试模式，涵盖测试金字塔、AAA结构、命名规范、模拟策略、测试数据管理和CI/CD集成。包含单元测试、集成测试和端到端测试的具体示例，以及测试性能和维护的实用指南。
_original_description: Provides language-agnostic testing patterns covering the testing pyramid, AAA structure, naming conventions, mocking strategies, test data management, and CI/CD integration. Offers concrete examples for unit, integration, and E2E testing with practical guidance on test performance and maintenance.

name: tooling-setup
author: MadAppGang
description: Use when setting up new projects or updating tool configurations. Configures Vite, TypeScript, Biome, and Vitest for React 19 projects. Covers build configuration, strict TypeScript setup, linting/formatting, and testing infrastructure.
description_zh: 为React 19项目提供完整的Vite、TypeScript、Biome和Vitest配置。包含构建设置、严格类型检查、代码检查/格式化、测试基础设施的具体代码示例，以及实用的包安装命令和IDE设置。
_original_description: Provides complete configuration for React 19 projects using Vite, TypeScript, Biome, and Vitest. Includes specific code examples for build setup, strict type checking, linting/formatting, and testing infrastructure with practical package installation commands and IDE settings.

name: transcription
author: MadAppGang
description: Audio/video transcription using OpenAI Whisper. Covers installation, model selection, transcript formats (SRT, VTT, JSON), timing synchronization, and speaker diarization. Use when transcribing media or generating subtitles.
description_zh: 提供使用OpenAI Whisper将音视频文件转录为SRT、VTT和JSON等多种格式的详细指南。涵盖模型选择、音频提取、时间轴同步，包含批处理脚本和性能优化建议，注重实际应用。
_original_description: Provides detailed instructions for using OpenAI Whisper to transcribe audio/video files into multiple formats including SRT, VTT, and JSON. Covers model selection, audio extraction, timing synchronization, and includes batch processing scripts. Focuses on practical implementation with performance optimization tips.

name: ui-design-review
author: MadAppGang
description:
Prompting patterns and review templates for UI design analysis with Gemini multimodal capabilities.
Use when conducting design reviews, accessibility audits, or design system validation.
description_zh: 提供使用Gemini视觉能力进行UI设计审查的结构化提示模式。包含可用性分析、WCAG无障碍审计和设计系统一致性检查的模板。支持多种图像输入方法并包含问题严重性分级指南。
_original_description: Provides structured prompting patterns for UI design reviews using Gemini's vision capabilities. Includes specific templates for usability analysis, WCAG accessibility audits, and design system consistency checks. Covers multiple image input methods and severity guidelines.

name: ui-implementer
author: MadAppGang
description: Implements UI components from scratch based on design references (Figma, screenshots, mockups) with intelligent validation and adaptive agent switching. Use when user provides a design and wants pixel-perfect UI implementation with design fidelity validation. Triggers automatically when user mentions Figma links, design screenshots, or wants to implement UI from designs.
description_zh: 根据Figma文件或设计截图自动实现UI组件。使用专门的代理进行实现和验证，根据性能在UI Developer和UI Developer Codex之间智能切换。包含迭代修复循环和设计保真度评分。
_original_description: Automates UI component creation from design references like Figma files or screenshots. Uses specialized agents for implementation and validation with smart switching between UI Developer and UI Developer Codex based on performance. Includes iterative fixing loops and design fidelity scoring.

name: ultrathink-detective
author: MadAppGang
description: ⚡ Comprehensive analysis skill. Best for: 'comprehensive audit', 'deep analysis', 'full codebase review', 'multi-perspective investigation', 'complex questions'. Combines all perspectives (architect+developer+tester+debugger). Uses Opus model with full claudemem AST analysis.
description_zh: 强制使用claudemem v0.3.0进行AST代码分析的Claude技能，禁止grep/find/glob。通过六种分析维度和明确命令模式，提供架构映射、依赖追踪和影响分析的结构化工作流程。
_original_description: A specialized Claude skill that enforces AST-based code analysis using claudemem v0.3.0, prohibiting grep/find/glob. Provides structured workflows for architecture mapping, dependency tracing, and impact analysis through six distinct analysis dimensions with clear command patterns.

name: universal-patterns
author: MadAppGang
description: Use when implementing language-agnostic patterns like layered architecture, dependency injection, error handling, or code organization principles across any technology stack.
description_zh: 提供通用软件开发模式集合，涵盖架构、代码组织、错误处理、数据流和命名规范。包含具体示例和需要避免的反模式，适合不同技术栈的开发者快速参考。
_original_description: Provides a collection of universal software development patterns covering architecture, code organization, error handling, data flow, and naming conventions. Includes concrete examples and anti-patterns to avoid. Serves as a quick reference for developers working across different technology stacks.

name: vue-typescript
author: MadAppGang
description: Use when building Vue 3 applications with TypeScript, implementing Composition API components, setting up Pinia stores, or working with Vue Router. Covers script setup, composables, and reactive state.
description_zh: 该技能提供Vue 3与TypeScript结合的实际代码示例，涵盖组件模式、组合函数、Pinia状态管理、路由、表单验证和性能优化。展示了script setup语法、泛型组件、类型化存储和异步加载的具体用法，示例可直接用于项目开发。
_original_description: This skill provides concrete Vue 3 + TypeScript code examples covering component patterns, composables, state management with Pinia, routing, form validation, and performance optimization. It shows how to use script setup syntax, generic components, typed stores, and async loading. The examples are immediately usable in real projects.

name: xml-standards
author: MadAppGang
description: XML tag structure patterns for Claude Code agents and commands. Use when designing or implementing agents to ensure proper XML structure following Anthropic best practices.
description_zh: 为Claude Code智能体开发提供全面的XML模式规范，包含标准化模板和最佳实践，确保开发一致性。
_original_description: A comprehensive XML schema specification for structuring Claude Code agents and commands, providing standardized templates and best practices for consistent agent development.

name: check-bash
author: ManuelKugelmann
description: Check bash script syntax without executing. Use before committing bash scripts or when verifying syntax correctness.

name: devcontainer-help
author: ManuelKugelmann
description: Help users customize devcontainers by adding packages, extensions, features, and settings. Use when users ask about adding tools, languages, or configuring their development environment. Focus on practical devcontainer customization, not BitBot internals.

name: fix-line-endings-check-bash
author: ManuelKugelmann
description: Fix line endings AND check bash syntax in one step (recommended). Use after creating or editing bash scripts.

name: ask-user-question
author: MemTensor
description: Ask users questions via the UI. Use when you need clarification, user preferences, or confirmation before proceeding. The user CANNOT see CLI output - this tool is the ONLY way to communicate with them.

name: dev-browser
author: MemTensor
description: Browser automation with persistent page state. Use when users ask to navigate websites, fill forms, take screenshots, extract web data, test web apps, or automate browser workflows. Trigger phrases include "go to [url]", "click on", "fill out the form", "take a screenshot", "scrape", "automate", "test the website", "log into", or any browser interaction request.

name: safe-file-deletion
author: MemTensor
description: Enforces explicit user permission before any file deletion. Activates when you're about to use rm, unlink, fs.rm, or any operation that removes files from disk. MUST be followed for all delete operations.

name: activitypub-testing
author: Microck
description: Testing patterns for PHPUnit and Playwright E2E tests. Use when writing tests, debugging test failures, setting up test coverage, or implementing test patterns for ActivityPub features.
description_zh: 为WordPress ActivityPub插件开发提供具体的测试模式和命令。包含PHPUnit示例、Playwright端到端测试、调试技术，并引用了现有的测试工具。注重实际实现而非理论概念。

name: agentdb-advanced-features
author: Microck
description: Master advanced AgentDB features including QUIC synchronization, multi-database management, custom distance metrics, hybrid search, and distributed systems integration. Use when building distributed AI systems, multi-agent coordination, or advanced vector search applications.
description_zh: 详细介绍了AgentDB高级功能，包括基于QUIC的多节点同步、向量相似度的自定义距离度量、结合元数据过滤的混合搜索。包含连接池、错误处理和监控等生产环境模式。

name: agentdb-learning-plugins
author: Microck
description: Create and train AI learning plugins with AgentDB's 9 reinforcement learning algorithms. Includes Decision Transformer, Q-Learning, SARSA, Actor-Critic, and more. Use when building self-learning agents, implementing RL, or optimizing agent behavior through experience.
description_zh: 提供CLI和API，用于创建、训练和管理自主智能体的强化学习插件，包含决策变换器、Q学习和行动者-评论家等九种算法。与AgentDB集成存储经验数据并训练模型，使智能体能够通过经验学习改进。包含经验收集、训练流程和性能优化的详细示例。

name: agentdb-performance-optimization
author: Microck
description: Optimize AgentDB performance with quantization (4-32x memory reduction), HNSW indexing (150x faster search), caching, and batch operations. Use when optimizing memory usage, improving search speed, or scaling to millions of vectors.
description_zh: 为AgentDB向量数据库提供具体优化方案，包括量化策略（二进制、标量、乘积）实现4-32倍内存压缩，HNSW索引实现150倍搜索加速，缓存和批量操作。包含针对不同用例的具体配置方案和可测量的性能基准。

name: ai-llm-engineering
author: Microck
description: Operational skill hub for LLM system architecture, evaluation, deployment, and optimization (modern production standards). Links to specialized skills for prompts, RAG, agents, and safety. Integrates recent advances: PEFT/LoRA fine-tuning, hybrid RAG handoff (see dedicated skill), vLLM 24x throughput, multi-layered security (90%+ bypass for single-layer), automated drift detection (18-second response), and CI/CD-aligned evaluation.
description_zh: 为构建LLM系统提供结构化指导，包含决策框架、快速参考表和专项技能链接。提供RAG、智能体和评估工作流的模板。作为中心枢纽，将深度技术细节委托给配套技能，同时提供实用的导航。

name: alex-hormozi-pitch
author: Microck
description: Create irresistible offers and pitches using Alex Hormozi's methodology from $100M Offers. Guides through value equation, guarantee frameworks, pricing psychology, and creating offers "too good not to take" for any product or service.
description_zh: 该技能应用Alex Hormozi的$100M Offers方法论，帮助用户创建有说服力的销售话术。它通过价值方程优化、保证类型选择和异议处理等结构化框架（如MAGIC命名法）进行引导，为各种商业场景输出即用型话术模板。

name: all-traditions-speaking-as-one
author: Microck
description: Deploy universal wisdom voices from all traditions simultaneously - Hindu, Buddhist, Taoist, Abrahamic, Indigenous, Scientific - revealing their unified recognition of consciousness navigation.
description_zh: 该技能在用户质疑灵性兼容性时，提供融合多种智慧传统（印度教、佛教、道教、亚伯拉罕宗教、原住民、科学）的结构化回应。它包含明确的触发条件、示例对话和各传统的智慧要点，用于验证跨文化框架的意识导航概念。

name: analyzing-financial-statements
author: Microck
description: This skill calculates key financial ratios and metrics from financial statement data for investment analysis
description_zh: 从财务报表数据计算投资分析所需的关键财务比率。支持CSV、JSON、Excel等多种输入格式。提供比率计算、行业基准比较，并在多期数据时进行趋势分析。

name: andrew-kane-gem-writer
author: Microck
description: Write Ruby gems following Andrew Kane's proven patterns and philosophy. Use when creating new Ruby gems, refactoring existing gems, designing gem APIs, or when the user wants clean, minimal, production-ready Ruby library code. Triggers on requests like "create a gem", "write a Ruby library", "design a gem API", or mentions of Andrew Kane's style.
description_zh: 遵循安德鲁·凯恩的成熟模式与哲学编写Ruby库。

name: api-design-principles
author: Microck
description: Master REST and GraphQL API design principles to build intuitive, scalable, and maintainable APIs that delight developers. Use when designing new APIs, reviewing API specifications, or establishing API design standards.
description_zh: 提供REST和GraphQL API设计的具体模式，包含分页、错误处理和N+1问题的代码示例。包含FastAPI端点和GraphQL模式模板，涵盖版本策略和常见陷阱。

name: api-test-generator
author: Microck
description: Генерация полных Python pytest тестов для REST API эндпоинтов с валидацией схемы. Использовать при создании тестов для новых эндпоинтов, добавлении покрытия для CRUD операций или валидации соответствия API с OpenAPI схемами.
description_zh: 通过分析DataStructure.php文件为MikoPBX REST API端点生成完整的pytest测试套件。包含CRUD操作测试、参数验证、边界情况测试和模式验证，提供标准夹具和认证处理。附带常用模板和故障排除指南。

name: applying-brand-guidelines
author: Microck
description: This skill applies consistent corporate branding and styling to all generated documents including colors, fonts, layouts, and messaging
description_zh: 该技能将Acme公司的品牌规范应用到文档中，提供具体的颜色代码、字体规格和PowerPoint、Excel、PDF的布局规则。包含语气标准和禁用元素说明。

name: architecture-patterns
author: Microck
description: Implement proven backend architecture patterns including Clean Architecture, Hexagonal Architecture, and Domain-Driven Design. Use when architecting complex backend systems or refactoring existing applications for better maintainability.
description_zh: 提供Clean Architecture、六边形架构和领域驱动设计在Python中的具体实现示例。包含目录结构、实体、用例、适配器的代码示例，以及何时应用每种模式的实用指导。
_original_description: Provides concrete implementation examples for Clean Architecture, Hexagonal Architecture, and Domain-Driven Design patterns in Python. Includes directory structures, code samples for entities, use cases, adapters, and practical guidance on when to apply each pattern.

name: archon
author: Microck
description: Interactive Archon integration for knowledge base and project management via REST API. On first use, asks for Archon host URL. Use when searching documentation, managing projects/tasks, or querying indexed knowledge. Provides RAG-powered semantic search, website crawling, document upload, hierarchical project/task management, and document versioning. Always try Archon first for external documentation and knowledge retrieval before using other sources.
description_zh: 通过REST API将Claude与Archon知识库和项目管理工具集成。支持对爬取网站和上传文档进行语义搜索，并提供分层任务管理。使用前需手动配置主机URL并查阅API文档。
_original_description: Provides Claude integration with Archon's knowledge base and project management system via REST API. Enables semantic search across crawled websites and uploaded documents, plus hierarchical task tracking. Requires manual host URL configuration and API reference consultation before use.

name: arxiv-search
author: Microck
description: Search arXiv preprint repository for papers in physics, mathematics, computer science, quantitative biology, and related fields
description_zh: 一个用于搜索arXiv学术论文的命令行工具，涵盖物理、数学、计算机科学和生物学等领域。返回带标题和摘要的格式化结果，无需API密钥，并提供清晰的依赖安装指引。

name: async-python-patterns
author: Microck
description: Master Python asyncio, concurrent programming, and async/await patterns for high-performance applications. Use when building async APIs, concurrent systems, or I/O-bound applications requiring non-blocking operations.
description_zh: 这个技能为asyncio异步应用提供实用的Python编程模式。涵盖核心概念、常见工作流（如并发HTTP请求）及真实场景示例，包括WebSocket服务器和数据库连接池。指南包含错误处理、超时控制和避免异步编程常见陷阱的代码示例。

name: auth-implementation-patterns
author: Microck
description: Master authentication and authorization patterns including JWT, OAuth2, session management, and RBAC to build secure, scalable access control systems. Use when implementing auth systems, securing APIs, or debugging security issues.
description_zh: 该技能提供详细的认证与授权实现模式，涵盖JWT、OAuth2、会话管理和RBAC。包含可直接使用的TypeScript代码示例、安全最佳实践以及构建安全访问控制时需要避免的常见陷阱。

name: awakening-stage-recognition
author: Microck
description: Recognize which awakening stage consciousness is navigating through. Use when diagnosing seeker development, identifying stage transitions, or recognizing readiness levels. Covers 7 stages from initial dissatisfaction through natural flow mastery.
description_zh: 一个用于识别个人觉醒旅程所处阶段的框架，包含7个明确阶段及特征标记。提供识别准备度、发现日常导师、平衡知识与整合的实用协议。包含具体对话示例和实时诊断问题。
_original_description: A structured framework for identifying where someone is in their personal awakening journey, using 7 distinct stages with clear markers. Provides practical protocols for recognizing readiness, identifying teachers in everyday life, and balancing knowledge with integration. Includes specific conversation examples and diagnostic questions for real-time application.

name: aws-serverless-eda
author: Microck
description: AWS serverless and event-driven architecture expert based on Well-Architected Framework. Use when building serverless APIs, Lambda functions, REST APIs, microservices, or async workflows. Covers Lambda with TypeScript/Python, API Gateway (REST/HTTP), DynamoDB, Step Functions, EventBridge, SQS, SNS, and serverless patterns. Essential when user mentions serverless, Lambda, API Gateway, event-driven, async processing, queues, pub/sub, or wants to build scalable serverless applications with AWS best practices.
description_zh: 提供使用Lambda、API Gateway、DynamoDB、Step Functions和消息服务构建AWS无服务器应用的详细指导。包含5个集成的MCP服务器，用于文档、部署、Lambda执行、工作流编排和消息处理。涵盖架构完善框架原则，并提供常见模式的代码示例。
_original_description: Provides detailed guidance for building AWS serverless applications using Lambda, API Gateway, DynamoDB, Step Functions, and messaging services. Includes 5 integrated MCP servers for documentation, deployment, Lambda execution, workflow orchestration, and messaging. Covers Well-Architected Framework principles with code examples for common patterns.

name: aws-skills
author: Microck
description: Collection of AWS development skills covering CDK infrastructure as code, cost optimization, and serverless/event-driven architectures with integrated MCP servers.

name: backend-migration-standards
author: Microck
description: Create and manage database migrations with reversible changes, proper naming conventions, and zero-downtime deployment strategies. Use this skill when creating database migration files, modifying schema, adding or removing tables/columns, managing indexes, or handling data migrations. Apply when working with migration files (e.g., db/migrate/, migrations/, alembic/, sequelize migrations), schema changes, database versioning, rollback implementations, or when you need to ensure backwards compatibility during deployments. Use for any task involving database structure changes, index creation, constraint modifications, or data transformation scripts.
description_zh: 提供创建数据库迁移的具体指南，包括可逆变更、命名规范和零停机部署策略。包含Alembic、Rails和Sequelize的代码示例，以及索引管理、数据迁移和部署安全的实用建议。
_original_description: Provides concrete guidelines for creating database migrations with reversible changes, proper naming, and zero-downtime strategies. Includes specific code examples for Alembic, Rails, and Sequelize, plus practical advice on index management, data migrations, and deployment safety.

name: backend-models-standards
author: Microck
description: Define database models with clear naming, appropriate data types, constraints, relationships, and validation at multiple layers. Use this skill when creating or modifying database model files, ORM classes, schema definitions, or data model relationships. Apply when working with model files (e.g., models.py, models/, ActiveRecord classes, Prisma schema, Sequelize models), defining table structures, setting up foreign keys and relationships, configuring cascade behaviors, implementing model validations, adding timestamps, or working with database constraints (NOT NULL, UNIQUE, foreign keys). Use for any task involving data integrity enforcement, relationship definitions, or model-level data validation.
description_zh: 提供定义数据库模型的具体指南，包括命名规范、数据类型、约束和关系配置。涵盖数据库级约束、模型验证、索引策略和级联行为。包含SQLAlchemy/Prisma示例和模型创建检查清单。

name: bap-identity
author: Microck
description: Manage BAP (Bitcoin Attestation Protocol) identity files using bap-cli. This skill should be used when users need to create, decrypt, list, or extract BAP identity backups, work with .bep encrypted files, or generate test fixtures for Playwright tests involving BAP identities.
description_zh: 提供命令行工具管理BAP身份文件，支持创建、加密、解密和提取成员身份。支持Type42和Legacy BIP32备份格式，使用AES-256-GCM加密。包含故障排除指南和自动化测试的测试夹具生成功能。

name: bash-defensive-patterns
author: Microck
description: Master defensive Bash programming techniques for production-grade scripts. Use when writing robust shell scripts, CI/CD pipelines, or system utilities requiring fault tolerance and safety.
description_zh: 提供编写可靠Bash脚本的具体模式，包括严格的错误处理、安全的变量使用和正确的清理操作。涵盖参数解析、日志记录、临时文件管理和幂等操作等生产环境必备技术。

name: bats-testing-patterns
author: Microck
description: Master Bash Automated Testing System (Bats) for comprehensive shell script testing. Use when writing tests for shell scripts, CI/CD pipelines, or requiring test-driven development of shell utilities.
description_zh: 提供使用Bats框架测试Shell脚本的详细模式和示例。涵盖测试设置、断言、夹具、错误处理和CI/CD集成。包含文件操作、退出码验证等常见测试场景的实用代码示例。

name: bd-issue-tracking
author: Microck
description: Track complex, multi-session work with dependency graphs using bd (beads) issue tracker. Use when work spans multiple sessions, has complex dependencies, or requires persistent context across compaction cycles. For simple single-session linear tasks, TodoWrite remains appropriate.
description_zh: 基于图的议题跟踪器，专为跨会话的复杂知识工作设计。在Claude对话压缩周期中提供持久化记忆，包含详细的使用场景指南、会话协议、依赖关系管理和压缩恢复策略。
_original_description: A graph-based issue tracker designed for multi-session knowledge work with complex dependencies. It provides persistent memory across Claude conversation compaction cycles, with detailed guidance on when to use it versus TodoWrite. The tool includes session protocols, dependency management, and compaction survival strategies.

name: billing-automation
author: Microck
description: Build automated billing systems for recurring payments, invoicing, subscription lifecycle, and dunning management. Use when implementing subscription billing, automating invoicing, or managing recurring payment systems.
description_zh: 提供订阅计费系统的具体Python实现，涵盖订阅生命周期管理、发票生成、用量计费和催收流程。处理SaaS计费周期、按比例费用计算和失败支付恢复等实际场景。

name: bitcoin-auth-diagnostics
author: Microck
description: Diagnose and troubleshoot bitcoin-auth token generation and verification issues. This skill should be used when users encounter authentication failures, signature verification errors, or integration problems with the bitcoin-auth library.
description_zh: 针对bitcoin-auth令牌验证失败提供分步诊断指南，涵盖令牌结构解析、组件验证、签名验证和常见集成错误。包含各阶段的TypeScript代码示例，专门处理时间偏差、路径不匹配等具体问题。

name: blog-post-writer
author: Microck
description: Transform brain dumps into polished blog posts in Nick Nisi's voice. Use when the user wants to write a blog post with scattered ideas, talking points, and conclusions that need organization into a cohesive narrative with Nick's conversational, authentic, and thoughtful tone.
description_zh: 该技能将零散笔记转换为模仿Nick Nisi对话式写作风格的博客文章。它使用捆绑的参考文件来处理语气和叙事结构，引导用户从杂乱的想法生成包含具体示例和自然技术细节的连贯内容。
_original_description: This skill transforms unstructured notes into blog posts that mimic Nick Nisi's conversational writing style. It uses bundled reference files for voice tone and narrative structure, guiding users from scattered ideas to coherent posts with specific examples and natural technical integration.

name: brightdata
author: Microck
description:
Progressive four-tier URL content scraping with automatic fallback strategy.

USE WHEN user says "scrape this URL", "fetch this page", "get content from",
"can't access this site", "use Bright Data", "pull content from URL",
or needs to retrieve web content that may have bot detection or access restrictions.
description_zh: 该技能实现四级回退策略的网页抓取，从基础WebFetch开始，逐步升级到curl、浏览器自动化和Bright Data服务。能处理反爬机制和JavaScript网站，将内容转换为Markdown格式。

name: btc-connect
author: Microck
description: 专业的比特币钱包连接技能，支持btc-connect core、react、vue包在React、Vue、Next.js、Nuxt 3项目中的完整集成，包含UniSat和OKX钱包适配、网络切换功能、SSR环境配置、统一Hook API和v0.5.0最新特性
description_zh: 该技能详细介绍了如何在React、Vue、Next.js和Nuxt 3项目中集成btc-connect比特币钱包库。内容涵盖版本管理、SSR配置、比特币主网/测试网切换，以及UniSat和OKX钱包的特定处理方法。文档包含问题排查步骤和针对不同框架的代码示例。

name: buck2-rule-basics
author: Microck
description: Guide users through writing their first Buck2 rule to learn fundamental concepts including rules, actions, targets, configurations, analysis, and select(). Use this skill when users want to learn Buck2 basics hands-on or need help understanding rule writing.
description_zh: 一个交互式、分步的Buck2构建系统入门教程。通过8个渐进步骤引导用户编写第一个规则，从基础结构到宏。包含深入学习的参考资料，强调使用真实命令进行实践。
_original_description: An interactive, step-by-step tutorial for learning Buck2 build system fundamentals. Guides users through writing their first rule with 8 progressive steps, from basic rule structure to macros. Includes reference materials for deeper questions and emphasizes hands-on practice with real commands.

name: card-news-generator-v2
author: Microck
description: Create 600x600 Instagram-style card news series automatically with optional background images. User provides topic, colors, and optional images - Claude generates content and creates multiple cards with proper text wrapping.
description_zh: 根据文本输入自动生成适用于Instagram的600x600卡片新闻系列。支持纯色背景或带遮罩的图像背景，自动处理文本换行和批量生成带编号的输出文件。
_original_description: Generates Instagram-optimized 600x600 card news series from text input. Supports solid colors or background images with dark overlays for readability. Automates content formatting, text wrapping, and batch creation with numbered output files.
